reviews.review_description:
Overall its a very fun game about storm chasing and tornados, but there are some really annoying bugs and stuff

1: when a tornado spawns, the game laggs a lot. Reccomended to fix.
2: hard to earn money when new. When i try to  place a free probe,  the invetory just bugs out a lot. Maybe try adding a camera and when you take a photo, it gives you about 50 to 1000 credits depending on how  close you are to the tornado. You can also buy different types of cameras for money and each camera gives more moneyand has better quality.

so what im tryna say is that you need to improve the game.

If u see bad reviews do listen because this game is better unless u have pc vr and if the games laggy go the menu and hit player settings and put unoptomize gameplay if u don't know how to do that is click 3 lines left controller and if it says game disconnected that means the host left and also if the probe gets glitched don't rejoin pick it up

This game is similar to gorilla tag but you chase down tornados this need more devs so the game will be better the intersecters are cool but there’s a glitch that we’re you do a zigzag while you driving you will go faster this game should compete to Roblox twisted best game ever.

------------------------------
Dear Traxzz Studios Support Team,
I am reaching out regarding an issue with a purchase I made in Ape Out VR.
Today, I bought the Dominator 2 car in the game. I encountered some technical issues with the vehicle, so I uninstalled the game and reinstalled it to see if that would fix the bugs. However, after reinstalling the game, my Dominator 2 car is completely missing from my inventory.
Here are my account details:

* Meta Quest Username: Nehemias_2016
* Item Purchased: Dominator 2 Car
* Date of Purchase: June 16, 2026

Since I do not have a Discord account, I am reaching out via email. Could you please help me restore this purchase or credit the Dominator 2 back to my account?
Thank you for your time and assistance.
Best regards,
Nehemias
------------------------------

reviews.review_title: Fun game but needs a little improvement
reviews.review_description: So I agree with SolarisGT The graphics do need a little bit of updating but it's still super fun and I recommend it because it has a bunch of cars that are actually real like the tiv one and the dominator 3 it's really laggy but if you click the three lines on your left controller well playing it will show you this menu and if you click on player settings and click optimize gameplay till it goes to unoptimized gameplay it should reduce the lag but this is still a pretty fun game

I was just playing then the owner joined so I just wanted to be with him I did nothing and then I got banned for a whole day def not a good owner so people who like to hangout with owners this game developer is rude and arrogant so if you like hanging out with owners I don't recommend this game and if you get banned you require discord which I don't so yea cool game and all but terrible owner so one star

First of all it’s super laggy and the tornadoes are way to fast and you should add walkie talkie and a camera that you can take a pic from and sell it for money also I think it’s pretty impossible to get money it’s either  pay to win or grind your butt off it’s not a good game fix it and revamp 
and better models  ￼

Upsides: 

 Awesome and accurate vehicles

Very good tornado physics

Map design is pretty good for a start

Very nice community

Very good variation in size and speeds of tornados

Cool probes


Downsides:

Whenever i try to place a probe, 50% of the time it doesn't place and just gets stuck on my hand, and respawning doesn't fix it.

Many tornadoes are very laggy.

The cheapest vehicle that isn't the default vehicle costs 65,000 credits, which is ridiculous with how hard it is to make credits, especially with all these bugs.

Sometimes after i respawn, it doesn't let me open my menu, not allowing me to get out my probe. Respawning again doesn't fix it.

Tornado radar glitches out sometimes and displays the tornado in the wrong place.

There is no leave lobby button. If you wanna switch lobbies you gotta leave and rejoin the whole game

Servers crash every once in a while

reviews.review_title: Best thing to ever ever I’m a huge storm
reviews.review_description: Hi, I’m dominator. This game is the best game that have ever played. It has all the tornado chasing vehicles is really fun. The tornadoes are realistic, but if one thing they can fix this to lagging, but after all the game is really fun. The game is really good and I love it so much and dominate

This game is fun but has a lot of lagging and bugs with the cars and the tornado sometimes when the cars spawn in they sometimes go up in the air but with interceptors when try to intercept them they sometimes don’t work making you get sucked up into the tornado. The second thing that I think is weird is that some tornadoes when they spawn it’s just a instant EF5 instead of spawning as a EF0 and working its way to a EF5. If the creators are reading this try to fix the deployment system and make the game more realistic. Forgot one more when your Kinda close to the tornado that’s spinning 80 mph when I am in my dom 3 and I still get picked up when it says it can withstand like a 100 mph tornado also when the room owner leaves make a random person the new room owner also fix the credits that you buy make a back button to buy more credits. Try to fix all the stuff that I said to make the game more fun.

This game is fun i tried it because i saw it on youtube and i was instantly hooked the moment i got in it it was so easy to learn how to play finding the car dealership was hard but when i found out it was in the middle of the map it was really easy to find it, it is a bit kinda hard to get money but i have a great time earning it i loved the game so much i already have the tiv 1 on the first day. This is a very good game i recommend dont listen to the people who say it isnt its kinda p2w but its still fun. This game really deserves more players for how hard the devs work on it.
